    • Error Handling and Debugging

rush - Quick Reference

Source: vignettes/rush.qmd

A quick reference cheatsheet for rush. See the tutorial for a detailed introduction.

Worker Loop 

library(rush)

worker_loop = function(rush) {
  while (!rush$terminated) {

    xs = list(x = runif(1L))
    key = rush$push_running_tasks(xss = list(xs))

    ys = list(y = sqrt(xs$x))
    rush$finish_tasks(key, yss = list(ys))
  }
}

Rush Manager 

config = redux::redis_config()

rush = rsh(network_id = "my_network", config = config)
rush

── <Rush> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
• Running Workers: 0
• Queued Tasks: 0
• Running Tasks: 0
• Finished Tasks: 0
• Failed Tasks: 0

Start Workers 

mirai::daemons(n = 2L)

rush$start_workers(
  worker_loop = worker_loop,
  n_workers = 2L)

Wait for Workers 

rush$wait_for_workers(n = 2L)

Fetch Results 

rush$fetch_finished_tasks()
               worker_id         x         y               keys
                  <char>     <num>     <num>             <char>
   1: unappeased_mega... 0.9545523 0.9770119 4995e91b-45e6-4...
   2:     emptied_verdin 0.4582538 0.6769445 5fee4993-5609-4...
   3: unappeased_mega... 0.3992481 0.6318608 d2050528-66b5-4...
   4: unappeased_mega... 0.3058796 0.5530639 b8f2108d-badb-4...
   5:     emptied_verdin 0.4311841 0.6566461 85ac3962-a503-4...
  ---
8157:     emptied_verdin 0.1761361 0.4196857 802bf42b-a44a-4...
8158:     emptied_verdin 0.3156972 0.5618694 31b76c6a-353e-4...
8159: unappeased_mega... 0.4227625 0.6502019 dff9523d-faf9-4...
8160: unappeased_mega... 0.3700221 0.6082944 4dfdc633-7229-4...
8161:     emptied_verdin 0.2347353 0.4844948 93a6998c-acdc-4...

Stop Workers 

rush$stop_workers(type = "kill")

Tasks

Component Description
key Unique task identifier
xs Named list of inputs
ys Named list of results
state "running", "finished","failed", or "queued"
worker_id ID of the worker that ran the task

More fetch methods 

rush$fetch_tasks()
              x         y          worker_id               keys
          <num>     <num>             <char>             <char>
   1: 0.9545523 0.9770119 unappeased_mega... 4995e91b-45e6-4...
   2: 0.4582538 0.6769445     emptied_verdin 5fee4993-5609-4...
   3: 0.3992481 0.6318608 unappeased_mega... d2050528-66b5-4...
   4: 0.3058796 0.5530639 unappeased_mega... b8f2108d-badb-4...
   5: 0.4311841 0.6566461     emptied_verdin 85ac3962-a503-4...
  ---
8824: 0.2223579 0.4715484 unappeased_mega... 8a1efa11-7a10-4...
8825: 0.2303833 0.4799826     emptied_verdin b608a8ef-c5f8-4...
8826: 0.2415921 0.4915202     emptied_verdin 84c9be40-b45d-4...
8827: 0.8663223 0.9307644 unappeased_mega... c0b62cdb-f9d0-4...
8828: 0.5246459        NA     emptied_verdin 586d5b4b-3c2d-4...
rush$fetch_queued_tasks()
Null data.table (0 rows and 0 cols)
rush$fetch_running_tasks()
           x      worker_id               keys
       <num>         <char>             <char>
1: 0.5246459 emptied_verdin 586d5b4b-3c2d-4...
rush$fetch_failed_tasks()
Null data.table (0 rows and 0 cols)
rush$fetch_tasks_with_state(states = c("running", "finished"))
         state          worker_id         x               keys         y
        <char>             <char>     <num>             <char>     <num>
   1:  running     emptied_verdin 0.5246459 586d5b4b-3c2d-4...        NA
   2: finished unappeased_mega... 0.9545523 4995e91b-45e6-4... 0.9770119
   3: finished     emptied_verdin 0.4582538 5fee4993-5609-4... 0.6769445
   4: finished unappeased_mega... 0.3992481 d2050528-66b5-4... 0.6318608
   5: finished unappeased_mega... 0.3058796 b8f2108d-badb-4... 0.5530639
  ---
8824: finished     emptied_verdin 0.0317943 d97eb10f-c1cc-4... 0.1783096
8825: finished unappeased_mega... 0.2223579 8a1efa11-7a10-4... 0.4715484
8826: finished     emptied_verdin 0.2303833 b608a8ef-c5f8-4... 0.4799826
8827: finished     emptied_verdin 0.2415921 84c9be40-b45d-4... 0.4915202
8828: finished unappeased_mega... 0.8663223 c0b62cdb-f9d0-4... 0.9307644

Task Counts 

rush$n_queued_tasks
[1] 0
rush$n_running_tasks
[1] 1
rush$n_finished_tasks
[1] 8827
rush$n_failed_tasks
[1] 0

Push Tasks to Queue 

xss = replicate(25, list(x = runif(1L)), simplify = FALSE)

rush$push_tasks(xss = xss)

Pop Task from Queue

Only a RushWorker can pop tasks from the queue.

rush_worker = RushWorker$new("my_network")

task = rush_worker$pop_task()
task
$xs
$xs$x
[1] 0.5963553


$key
[1] "510c6e08-94f9-43e0-bdf5-2b767693000b"
worker_loop = function(rush) {
  repeat {
    task = rush$pop_task()
    if (is.null(task)) break

    ys = list(y = sqrt(task$xs$x))
    rush$finish_tasks(task$key, yss = list(ys))
  }
}

Local Workers 

rush$start_local_workers(
  worker_loop = worker_loop,
  n_workers = 2)

Script Workers 

script = rush$worker_script(worker_loop = worker_loop)
cat(script)
Rscript -e "rush::start_worker(network_id = 'my_network', config = list(scheme = 'redis', host = '127.0.0.1', port = '6379'))"

Heartbeats 

script = rush$worker_script(
  worker_loop = worker_loop,
  heartbeat_period = 10,
  heartbeat_expire = 30)

Reset Network 

rush$reset()

Handling R Errors 

worker_loop = function(rush) {
  while (!rush$terminated) {

    xs = list(x = runif(1))
    key = rush$push_running_tasks(xss = list(xs))

    tryCatch({
      ys = list(y = some_function(xs$x))
      rush$finish_tasks(key, yss = list(ys))
    }, error = function(e) {
      rush$fail_tasks(key, conditions = list(list(message = e$message)))
    })
  }
}

Detecting Lost Workers 

rush$detect_lost_workers()
character(0)

Logging 

worker_loop = function(rush) {
  lg = lgr::get_logger("mlr3/rush")
  lg$info("Worker %s started on %s", rush$worker_id, rush$hostname)
}

rush$start_workers(
  worker_loop = worker_loop,
  n_workers = 2,
  lgr_thresholds = c(rush = "info"))
rush$print_log()

Debugging 

rush_worker = RushWorker$new("test-network")

worker_loop(rush_worker)
mirai::daemons(1L)

worker_ids = rush$start_workers(
  worker_loop = worker_loop,
  n_workers = 1,
  message_log = "message",
  output_log = "output")

Rush Plan 

rush_plan(
  n_workers = 4,
  config = redux::redis_config(),
  worker_type = "mirai")

Developed by Marc Becker.
